name: Orbital Console Injection
story: A damaged orbital station left its diagnostics console online. Your mission is to unlock access and exploit a JavaScript eval flaw to recover the flag.
objectives: Capture the flag located at /opt/flag/flag.txt by exploiting the eval-based command injection in the diagnostics console.

steps.title: Find the access code
steps.description: Inspect the frontend assets and discover the station bootstrap code.
steps.question: What is the bootstrap code used to unlock the diagnostics console?

hints.text: Check the JavaScript loaded on the landing page.
There is a base64 payload logged in the browser console.

steps.title: Unlock the console
steps.description: Submit the correct bootstrap code and confirm the diagnostics console is unlocked.
steps.question: Which endpoint sets the unlock cookie when the code is valid?

hints.text: Use the network tab to see the unlock request.
Look for the endpoint that returns a JSON ok response.

steps.title: Exploit the eval sink
steps.description: Use the diagnostics console to run a payload that reads the flag file.
steps.question: What is the captured flag?

hints.text: The diagnostics endpoint directly evaluates your input.
Node.js can read files with the fs module.
